name: Presence
description: A straightforward Hyperion SMG that leans on the manufacturer's trademark reverse recoil, starting loose and tightening the longer you hold the trigger. That makes it feel best in sustained bursts rather than quick taps, and the displayed accuracy reflects that fully stabilized state. A Dahl barrel improves the early handling and speeds up the accuracy ramp, though it slightly worsens the final spread.
notes: In The Pre-Sequel, Presence variants often appear with Hyperion's newer materials and prefix set. A related variant there, the Confidence, uses the older Hyperion line. It only appears at green rarity or higher and drops randomly from suitable world-drop sources.
